text:
divorce, termination of a marital union, also known as dissolution of marriage. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "dissolution"
- Commons category: "Divorce"
- Unicode character: "⚮"
- described by source: "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition",
 "Granat Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Pauly–Wissowa"
- instance of: "marital status"
- follows: "married",
 "legal separation"
- has cause: "marital breakdown",
 "breakup"
- opposite of: "marriage"
- partially coincident with: "infidelity"
- has immediate cause: "sham marriage"
